parents.subject: LU-17906 ptlrpc: fix bug in import_select_connection()

commit.subject: LU-17906 lnet: change LNetPeerDiscovered to use LNET_LOCK_EX
commit.message:
LU-17906 lnet: change LNetPeerDiscovered to use LNET_LOCK_EX

Modify LNetPeerDiscovered to hold LNET_LOCK_EX vs. the cpt lock
when calling lnet_peer_queue_for_discovery.

Fixes: 6fe522d3d4 ("LU-17906 pltrpc: don't use non-uptodate peer at connect")
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9371a88e17757cbe3380defd5c6f4e26ed626178
